common.appDescription: Create digital avatars of your loved ones, whether memorializing or staying connected, love transcends time and distance

home.title: Keep Your Loved Ones Close
home.subtitle: Create digital avatars of your family, companionship beyond time and distance
home.heroDescription: Whether memorializing a loved one or staying connected with distant parents, growing children, or long-distance partners, digital avatars keep love and companionship alive
home.photoDesc: Upload 1-3 photos to help AI generate an avatar
home.audioDesc: Upload at least 1 minute of clear voice recording, AI will clone their voice

features.voiceDesc: Upload voice recordings, AI replicates their way of speaking
features.memoryDesc: The more you chat, the more it learns, memories never fade
features.styleDesc: Import chat history, AI learns their expression habits
features.emotionDesc: Recognizes emotions, responds like a real person

create.descriptionPlaceholder: More stories and memories about them...
create.photoDesc: Upload 1-3 photos to help AI generate an avatar
create.audioDesc: Upload at least 1 minute of clear voice recording. AI will clone their voice. You can skip this step if no recording is available.
create.calibrateDesc: Paste real chat history with {name}, AI will learn their speaking style.
create.calibrateHighlight: This is the most critical step for making the memorial authentic.
create.calibratePlaceholder:
Paste chat history, e.g.:
You: What did you cook today, Mom?
Mom: I made your favorite dumplings!
create.requiredFields: Please fill in the name, select a relationship, and add at least 3 keywords

presets.livingParentDesc: For parents who live far away, create a digital presence so you can always talk to them
presets.growingChildDesc: Capture your child's personality at different life stages, create a time capsule of their growth
presets.longDistancePartnerDesc: For couples in long-distance relationships, create an AI companion that understands your partner's personality

chat.chatMore: The more you chat, the more it understands about your loved one
chat.newConversation: Just getting to know each other
chat.errorRetry: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later.
chat.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support speech recognition

dashboard.title: My Memorials
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create a digital memorial and start a conversation
dashboard.deleteMessage: This cannot be undone. All conversations and memories will be lost.

timeline.title: Memory Timeline
timeline.pendingTooltip: This memory is not yet confirmed

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Every warm connection deserves to be cherished. Pick the plan that fits you best.
